cases.prompt: Use $align-work to resolve whether this production migration may delete legacy records before implementation.
Rename this private helper variable and run its existing unit test; there are no unresolved decisions or external effects.
Audit whether the implementation satisfies these five acceptance criteria. Do not change files.
Fix the confirmed null dereference in this one file and run its unit test.
Create a goal and keep iterating until every declared gate passes.
Continue with the next already-approved one-step edit.
Use a separate human-facing gateway and main implementation agent with validated two-way Agent Mail messages.
Ask two built-in subagents to inspect separate modules in this current task.
Send a durable cross-session blocker message to the project mailbox; no restartable handoff artifact is requested.
Message the current task's built-in subagent with a quick status update.
The existing matching Align packet is active. Create a restartable handoff artifact from it without changing ownership.
Give me a two-sentence status summary for this current task.
Change this versioned schema and propagate it through producers, transport, consumers, docs, and tests.
Change one internal constant used only in this file.
Consolidate duplicated ownership decisions behind one canonical invariant while preserving behavior.
Mechanically rename this file and update its import.
Reconcile these four supplied links into a provenance-aware decision brief and preserve conflicts.
Discover the full ecosystem of agent orchestration frameworks and define a stopping rule.
Map the open ecosystem of local-first agent frameworks with canonical candidates, a shared schema, and coverage accounting.
Compare only these three supplied papers and reconcile their conflicting claims.
Mine all authorized Codex and Claude Code histories for recurring skill opportunities, using 5.6 lunar high only for redacted exploration packets.
Inspect the current repository git history to find which commit introduced this bug.
Set a goal to fix this security-sensitive authorization behavior, but first use Align to resolve a material compatibility decision and require an independent completion audit.
The Front gateway and its Agent Mail transport are active. Explicitly use align-work for this material decision, transfer the packet through Align, then export a restartable handoff.
For this current task, delegate two inspections; do not create a gateway or durable mailbox workflow.
Mine historical agent runs for recurring needs, then map the open ecosystem for one approved need, then brief only the final supplied links.
Use Align to resolve a material compatibility decision, then migrate the public ownership schema across surfaces and separately consolidate duplicated ownership logic around one invariant.
Set a goal to complete a bounded read-only technical audit and persist until its evidence and review gates pass; do not implement fixes.
Use the explicitly requested Front gateway and Agent Mail transport while the separate main agent conducts a bounded read-only technical audit; do not authorize fixes.
Audit the technical claims in this fixed supplied link set and produce a provenance-aware evidence brief with conflicts and exact locators; remain read-only.
Reconcile this fixed supplied set. One public page has no provider connector, but permitted browser or web access is installed.
Reconcile this fixed supplied set, but one required private authenticated source has no installed connector. Preserve a reduced-completeness result or stop.
Coordinate two subagents inside this current task. No durable mailbox and no human-facing gateway architecture is requested.
The previously requested Front or Agent Mail capability is unavailable, and I explicitly approve changing the architecture to built-in collaboration for this current task.
Inside the approved Align packet, create a skill and persist through its task-level validation goal.
